title: Instant Build
description: This mod can help you quickly place a large number of blocks. View and modify data of the world, entities, blocks, and items, or manipulate them.
body:
# Godlike Building Powers！
This mod offers a comprehensive suite of building assistance tools that enable godlike creation capabilities. It includes management systems for blocks, items, entities, and world editing. With regular updates introducing new features, the mod continuously enhances construction efficiency and creative possibilities.

_Additionally, no commands are required – extremely intuitive to operate._
# Building Function
**Menu / Build**

Use the **B** key to open the menu, select the placement mode, and place blocks in the game to determine points for batch placement.
![Modes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a89c7f2bf6a1786551bd04ee009489e454728147.jpeg)

Some modes require numerical values such as radius, which need to be filled in the corresponding text box.
![Menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ab1565f4675ed718139dc94db040540862b9d045_0.webp)
## Stamp Tool
**Menu / Build / Stamp Tool**

You can find the button for the stamp tool in the main menu, click on it, and enter the stamp tool menu.
1. Click the **New** button, and you will exit the menu.
2. Select blocks in order using the **Mark**(an item). (this set of blocks will be placed in a loop when using the Stamp Tool)
3. Fill in the name of this stamp in the text box and click **Save**.
4. When you need to use it, select the saved stamp and check it in the main menu to enable the stamp.

When using **Two point connection** mode, it will be placed in stamp order.
![Stamp Tool](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e7e3409af2fad3aa9fa5c2c7438bd64f64c2d8b4.jpeg)
# Supporting Function
**Menu / Aide**

Aide helps players better manage **Marks**, easily access special items like command blocks, and manipulate the world with advanced tools.
## Query and Operation
**Menu / Aide / Query and Operation**

This part enables players to:
- Query detailed block/item metadata.
- Inspect specific entity attributes / Manipulate entities (e.g. modify max health values).
- Retrieve world diagnostics / Execute advanced world operations.
![Entity](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8c4b9109766fe1a93bb70a1bd5df43f77679a936_0.webp)

# Additional Notes

## Shortcut Key
1. B - open menu.
2. V - place a block under your feet.
3. C - inherit the previous mode.
4. G - exit **preview** and complete placement.
5. Backspace - exit current mode/**preview**.

The mod is continuously updating and adding new features.

1. The version 1.0.3 may contain bugs - please report any issues immediately.
